author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Root cause: uv was not installed on this machine. Both .claude/mcp/*.py servers launch via 'uv run' (PEP-723 inline script metadata), so both failed with 'uv: command not found'. Installed uv 0.11.7 via https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh into ~/.local/bin (already on PATH). Verified both servers now respond to MCP initialize and 'claude mcp list' reports both as ✓ Connected.
